LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS THE 1991 LIPMAN FAMILY TRUST, JULIE BERNARD, CITIBROKERS REAL ESTATE CO. AND UZIEL, ABRAHAM'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501, THE REAL PROPERTY COURT, TO BE HEARD ON FEBRUARY 18, 2014 AT 9:30 AM. (SEE SFLR 8.10.). JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-17-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-18-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT THE 1991 LIPMAN FAMILY TRUST, JULIE BERNARD, CITIBROKERS REAL ESTATE CO., AND ABRAHAM UZIEL'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT REMAIN AS TO THE FOLLOWING CAUSES OF ACTION: PLAINTIFF DANNY HOM AND JENNIFER TJON'S CLAIMS FOR GENERAL NEGLIGENCE, NEGLIGENCE UNDER THE PECULIAR RISK DOCTRINE, NEGLIGENCE UNDER THE UNSAFE PREMISES DOCTRINE, NEGLIGENCE FOR HIRING, AND PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE'S CLAIM FOR SUBROGATION. QUESTIONS REMAIN ABOUT WHETHER THERE WAS A DUTY AND WHETHER THERE WAS A BEACH. DEFENDANTS THE 1991 LIPMAN FAMILY TRUST, JULIE BERNARD, CITIBROKERS REAL ESTATE CO., AND ABRAHAM UZIEL'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO PLAINTIFF DANNY HOM AND JENNIFER TJON'S CLAIMS FOR STRICT LIABILITY FOR ULTRAHAZARDOUS ACTIVITY AND BREACH OF THE WARRANTY OF HABITABILITY IS GRANTED AS A MATTER OF LAW. PLAINTIFFS GAVE FAILED TO MEET THEIR BURDEN IN REBUTTAL. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or The Alt Summ Summ Adj; Evidence
Off Calendar Feb-18-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Teela A. Crosthwaite, Esq. of Clapp Moroney Bellagamba Vucinich Beeman Scheley, (650-989-5400), for 1991 Lipman Family Trust, Julie Bernard, Citibrokers Real Estate Co. and Abraham Uziel, Defendants and moving parties.
Davin Bacho, Esq. of Bledsoe, (415-981-5411), for Allen Lee and TT Lee Corp., Defendants.
Mario Jose Jovel, Esq. of Dunning Law Firm, (415-956-1888), for Danny Hom, Plaintiff and opposing party.
Amanda Stevens, Esq. of Culbreth Schroeder LLP, (916-488-8300), for Allstate, Plaintiff.
Daniel Schmaeiling, Esq. of Law Offices of John A. Biard, (916-638-6356), for Travelers, Intervenor.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT THE 1991 LIPMAN FAMILY TRUST, JULIE BERNARD, CITIBROKERS REAL ESTATE CO., and ABRAHAM UZIEL's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED. Triable issues of fact remain as to the following causes of action: Plaintiff Danny Hom and Jennifer Tjon's claims for general negligence, negligence under the peculiar risk doctrine, negligence under the unsafe premises doctrine, negligence for hiring, and Plaintiff Allstate's claim for subrogation. Questions remain about whether there was a duty and whether there was a beach. Defendants the 1991 Lipman Family Trust, Julie Bernard, Citibrokers Real Estate Co., and Abraham Uziel's Motion for Summary Adjudication as to Plaintiff Danny Hom and Jennifer Tjon's claims for strict liability for ultrahazardous activity and breach of the warranty of habitability is GRANTED as a matter of law. Plaintiffs gave failed to meet their burden in rebuttal. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Richard A. Kramer, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
